decisions.title: cache user profile data with 15-minute TTL to reduce database reads
decisions.rationale: 15-minute TTL accepted to reduce database load; performance target (≥90% hit rate) met. Core assumption that mid-session permission changes are rare was refuted by incidents #4471 and #4489.
evidence: cache hit rate 93–95% — performance target met (2024-07-20)
incidents #4471, #4489: contractor role revocations persisted in cache up to 14 minutes; two cases in audit review period (2024-07-20)

hypotheses.text: mid-session permission changes are rare enough that a 15-minute TTL does not create a meaningful security gap
hypotheses.refuting_evidence: incidents #4471 and #4489: revoked contractor access persisted up to 14 minutes; two cases discovered in a single audit review, suggesting the pattern is not isolated
